scope.description: Replace single lightBudgetAmount number input on Step 4 of /gaffer/projects/new with a multi-vendor picker. Each selected VENDOR contact gets its own per-row planned amount. Vendors are submitted as project members alongside team; sum of vendor amounts is sent as lightBudgetAmount for backward compat. Project detail page (unchanged) already renders vendor aggregates via vendorPlanTotal/vendorPaidTotal/vendorRemaining shipped in prior sprint.
commits: 6c1f91f — feat(gaffer): multi-vendor picker на шаге 4 создания проекта
cd32a42 — fix(gaffer): не отбрасывать ренталы с plannedAmount=0 из payload
scope.backend_changes: none — all backend plumbing already in place from prior sprints (VENDOR enum, createProject accepts mixed members, server splits aggregates by contact type, tenant isolation via gafferWhere)
scope.frontend_changes: new vendor picker grid + inline create form + per-vendor amount rows + auto-summed total on Step 4; Step 6 Итог «Должен ренталу» row shows vendor count via pluralize; lightBudgetAmount derived from vendor sum

medium_addressed_in_fix: Product MEDIUM: vendors with plannedAmount=0 silently filtered from payload → fixed in cd32a42 by removing the filter entirely (gaffer can lock in rental set now, fill amounts later on detail page)
low_deferred: Product LOW: deselect requires scrolling back to the vendor grid (same UX as team — consistent pre-existing pattern)
Product LOW: empty-state copy for tenants with no VENDOR contacts (consistent with team pattern)
Technical LOW: lightBudgetAmount state is now dead weight (only written by draft restore) — safe but could be pruned in a cleanup sprint
Technical LOW: crew-calculator round-trip silently drops selectedVendors (pre-existing limitation of NewProjectDraft — also drops selectedMembers, consistent)
Technical LOW: four independent useEffect blocks could be collapsed (readable as-is)

verification.tests: N/A — UI-only mirror of existing team-picker pattern; backend plumbing unchanged and covered by prior sprint tests
